project.name: SpektoWatch2
project.description: SwiftUI iOS/watchOS acoustic measurement app for live microphone analysis, spectrogram and level widgets, recording, measurement metadata, export/reporting, Apple Watch companion views, and WatchKit complications.

nodes.name: AppGroup.swift
nodes.summary: Shared App Group identifier and complication defaults keys intended to bridge watch app state into the WidgetKit complication extension.

nodes.name: RingBuffer.swift
nodes.summary: Fixed-capacity FIFO buffer used by watch spectrogram views to avoid Array.removeFirst costs on repeated frame append.

nodes.name: SpectrogramData.swift
nodes.summary: Shared spectrogram payload model with Z/A/C magnitudes, optional visual DCT/mel bins, metrics, sample rate, and versioned binary encoding.

nodes.name: WatchAppState.swift
nodes.summary: Versioned JSON envelope for non-audio iOS-to-watch state such as preset, recording flag, accent, theme, and future tone state.

nodes.name: WatchConnectivityManager.swift
nodes.summary: Watch-side/shared connectivity implementation for watch-originated spectrogram sends, command/config receipt, app-group complication updates, and reachability tracking.

nodes.name: WatchConnectivityProtocol.swift
nodes.summary: Shared message and binary packet contract for recording commands, gain/source/weighting/config messages, app state updates, and spectrogram payload dispatch.

nodes.name: WatchWidgetConfiguration.swift
nodes.summary: Shared watch dashboard widget types, single-value types, 4x4 widget configuration, default layout, and Codable persistence helpers.

nodes.name: SpektoWatchComplications.swift
nodes.summary: WidgetKit bundle entrypoint that exposes circular, corner, rectangular, and inline level complications.

nodes.name: WatchComplicationProvider.swift
nodes.summary: Timeline provider that reads the latest live level and weighting from the App Group defaults and relies on explicit timeline reloads.

nodes.name: WatchComplicationViews.swift
nodes.summary: WidgetKit complication views for circular, corner, rectangular, and inline watch families.

nodes.name: SpektoWatchApp.swift
nodes.summary: watchOS app entrypoint that wires WatchConnectivityManager and WatchAudioEngine into the watch UI and handles scene backgrounding.

nodes.name: WatchAudioEngine.swift
nodes.summary: watchOS audio engine with local microphone capture, Accelerate FFT/DCT display data, extended runtime session handling, companion/wearable mode switching, and processed spectrogram sends.

nodes.name: WatchDashboardView.swift
nodes.summary: watchOS modular dashboard that renders configured watch widgets and can start/stop wearable microphone sessions.

nodes.name: WatchRecordingSession.swift
nodes.summary: Recording lifecycle, persistence, playback, or detail UI support.

nodes.name: WatchSpectrogramView.swift
nodes.summary: Full-screen watch spectrogram face that consumes WatchAudioEngine.liveData, stores frames in RingBuffer, supports Digital Crown zoom, and starts/stops wearable recording.

nodes.name: WatchLevelMeterWidget.swift
nodes.summary: Watch dashboard level widget that derives level and dB weighting label from WatchAudioEngine.liveData and connectivity state.

nodes.name: WatchSpectrogramWidget.swift
nodes.summary: Compact watch dashboard spectrogram widget that renders liveData frames with a fixed-capacity RingBuffer.

nodes.name: AppServices.swift
nodes.summary: Main service graph for BandstopFilterManager, WatchConnectivityManager, RecordingManager, FFTConfiguration, MaskingProfileManager, AudioEngine, and MaskingEngine.

nodes.name: AudioEngine.swift
nodes.summary: Central iOS live-audio pipeline: AVAudioEngine capture or simulator data, FFT/weighting/metrics processing, live state publication, recording writers, wearable-source ingestion, and throttled watch updates.

nodes.name: CSVExporter.swift
nodes.summary: CSV and JSON export utilities over MeasurementDataReader frames, including metric filtering and Z/A/C third-octave columns.

nodes.name: DashboardManager.swift
nodes.summary: Persisted multi-layout dashboard manager with legacy migration, widget add/remove/resize/settings, presets, and screenshot catalog layouts.

nodes.name: DashboardViewModel.swift
nodes.summary: Dashboard coordinator that binds dashboard persistence, microphone-source selection, watch commands/data, and widget spectral-weighting requirements into AudioEngine.

nodes.name: HighEndSpectrogramAdapter.swift
nodes.summary: Metal-backed live spectrogram MTKView and SwiftUI wrappers; consumes AudioEngine.spectrogramSubject, maps visual/mel bins into a texture ring buffer, and renders axes.

nodes.name: HighEndSpectrogramShaders.metal
nodes.summary: Metal shader functions used by the high-end spectrogram renderer for live/playback texture rendering and colormap sampling.

nodes.name: MeasurementDataFormat.swift
nodes.summary: Binary .spekto schema, header/frame models, little-endian Data helpers, and cursor decoding utilities for measurement frames.

nodes.name: MeasurementDataReader.swift
nodes.summary: Streaming reader for .spekto files with v1/v2 header support and typed frame decoding for playback and export paths.

nodes.name: MeasurementDataWriter.swift
nodes.summary: Bounded asynchronous writer for .spekto measurement frames containing timestamps, metrics, broadband level, third-octave tracks, and optional full FFT.

nodes.name: Recording.swift
nodes.summary: Codable recording metadata model for stored audio, measurement sidecars, photos, tags, markers, calibration, FFT, and playback configuration.

nodes.name: ModularDashboardView.swift
nodes.summary: Primary iOS dashboard shell with paged layouts, edit mode, drag/drop/reorder, widget cards, preset rail, settings, and control bar.

nodes.name: PDFReportGenerator.swift
nodes.summary: PDF report generator for recordings with metadata, charts, spectrogram imagery, configuration, notes, and photos.

nodes.name: PlaybackSpectrogramView.swift
nodes.summary: Spectrogram processing, rendering, settings, or export support.

nodes.name: FFTProcessor.swift
nodes.summary: Thread-safe Accelerate/vDSP FFT implementation with window functions, reconfiguration, reusable output buffers, dB conversion, and frequency-bin helpers.

nodes.name: FrequencyWeightingProcessor.swift
nodes.summary: Immutable Sendable processor for IEC-style A, C, and Z frequency weighting curves, including precomputed dB and squared-gain arrays for vectorized audio metrics.

nodes.name: RealtimeAudioFileWriter.swift
nodes.summary: Bounded asynchronous AVAudioFile writer that copies audio tap buffers into a pool and drains them on a utility queue.

nodes.name: RecordingCoordinator.swift
nodes.summary: Observable recording flags and duration extracted from AudioEngine while AudioEngine still owns the AVAudioEngine and writer lifecycle.

nodes.name: RecordingManager.swift
nodes.summary: Recording metadata and file persistence manager with add/update/delete/duplicate/photo helpers and durable soft-delete sidecar recovery.

nodes.name: SpectrogramCrosshairOverlay.swift
nodes.summary: Spectrogram processing, rendering, settings, or export support.

nodes.name: SpectrogramImageExporter.swift
nodes.summary: PNG export wrapper that validates recorded audio, invokes SpectrogramImageRenderer, and writes a temporary spectrogram image.

nodes.name: SpectrogramImageRenderer.swift
nodes.summary: Offline UIKit/AVFoundation/Accelerate spectrogram renderer used to turn recorded audio into a PNG-ready UIImage.

nodes.name: SpectrogramProcessor.swift
nodes.summary: Post-FFT processor that applies bandstop attenuation, third-octave aggregation, binning, temporal smoothing, and diagnostics before UI/recording publication.

nodes.name: SpectrogramSettingsView.swift
nodes.summary: Spectrogram processing, rendering, settings, or export support.

nodes.name: SpectrogramView.swift
nodes.summary: Spectrogram processing, rendering, settings, or export support.

nodes.name: SpectrogramWidget.swift
nodes.summary: Dashboard spectrogram widget that resolves per-widget settings and hosts HighEndSpectrogramAdapterWithAxes.

nodes.name: SpektoWatch2App.swift
nodes.summary: iOS app entrypoint that builds AppServices, defers audio startup until after first render, injects environment services, and seeds/reset state for UI tests.

nodes.name: RecordingDetailComponents.swift
nodes.summary: Recording lifecycle, persistence, playback, or detail UI support.

nodes.name: RecordingDetailView.swift
nodes.summary: Playback/detail UI for recordings; loads audio and .spekto data, renders analysis/waterfall/playback widgets, edits metadata/photos, and exposes PDF/CSV/PNG/raw-data export actions.

nodes.name: RecordingsListView.swift
nodes.summary: Recording lifecycle, persistence, playback, or detail UI support.

nodes.name: WatchConnectivityManager.swift
nodes.summary: iOS-side WatchConnectivity manager for queued control messages, dashboard config, microphone source, frequency weighting, adaptive spectrogram sends, and incoming watch data.

nodes.name: WaterfallDataBuilder.swift
nodes.summary: Pure builder for downsampling spectrogram history into waterfall slices and frequency axes for playback/dashboard views.

nodes.name: WidgetCardView.swift
nodes.summary: Reusable dashboard card chrome that routes each WidgetConfiguration to its concrete audio, chart, tone, lab, or masking widget and handles edit controls.

nodes.name: WidgetConfiguration.swift
nodes.summary: Codable widget model, widget type catalog, discrete size migration/clamping rules, grid positions, and shared widget settings defaults.

nodes.name: AudioEngineTests.swift
nodes.summary: Unit and performance tests for AudioEngine defaults, FFT/weighting controls, external audio sample rate, optional spectral tracks, wearable live mode, watch spectrogram ingestion, and level-history bounds.

nodes.name: FFTProcessorTests.swift
nodes.summary: FFT/windowing tests for function generation, FFT reconfiguration, sine/silence behavior, dB conversion, reusable output APIs, bin mapping, diagnostics, and mel support.

nodes.name: HighEndSpectrogramAdapterTests.swift
nodes.summary: Metal spectrogram adapter tests for initialization, texture update inputs, settings setters, reset, axis metrics, and Metal availability skips.

nodes.name: MeasurementDataIOTests.swift
nodes.summary: Roundtrip, backpressure, full-FFT, and legacy v1 compatibility tests for .spekto writer/reader behavior.

nodes.name: RecordingManagerTests.swift
nodes.summary: RecordingManager tests for lifecycle, directory creation, metadata save/load behavior, URLs, and file deletion.

nodes.name: SpectrogramImageExporterTests.swift
nodes.summary: Spectrogram processing, rendering, settings, or export support.

nodes.name: WatchAudioEngineTests.swift
nodes.summary: Audio capture and processing engine for live acoustic measurements.

nodes.name: WatchConnectivityTests.swift
nodes.summary: Protocol tests for SpectrogramData binary serialization, message factories, packet headers, adaptive freshness constants, invalid data, and queue simulation.

nodes.name: ScreenshotCatalogTests.swift
nodes.summary: XCUI screenshot catalog that walks dashboard edit/settings/picker, recordings list/detail, layouts menu/dialog, and empty dashboard states with seeded data.

nodes.name: WatchAppScreenshotTests.swift
nodes.summary: Watch UI screenshot tests covering dashboard and spectrogram views when a watch simulator is available.

nodes.name: WatchAudioEngineTests.swift
nodes.summary: Watch-target tests for WatchAudioEngine initial state, gain handling, notification guards, main-thread publication, and deinit safety.

edges.reason: The app entrypoint owns AppServices as its StateObject and calls startAudio after first appearance.
AppServices constructs AudioEngine after Metal prewarm and applies the shared FFTConfiguration.
AppServices creates MaskingEngine with the same AudioEngine once audio startup completes.
ContentView hosts ModularDashboardView as the primary app surface.
AudioEngine snapshots FFTProcessor on the processing lock and uses it for FFT magnitude and dB conversion.
AudioEngine uses FrequencyWeightingProcessor for A/C spectral tracks and energy accumulation.
AudioEngine passes Z/A/C dB arrays through SpectrogramProcessor for filtering, aggregation, binning, and smoothing.
SpectrogramProcessor reads enabled bandstop filters to attenuate FFT bins before aggregation.
AudioEngine sends weighted energies and peak levels into AcousticMetricsCalculator for live and recorded metrics.
AudioEngine and SpectrogramProcessor use the canonical third-octave band model for display bands.
AudioEngine forwards recording flags and duration through RecordingCoordinator while retaining capture control.
AudioEngine uses RealtimeAudioFileWriter from the audio tap when recording to an audio file.
AudioEngine writes per-frame metrics, third-octave bands, and full FFT snapshots to .spekto files.
The writer uses MeasurementDataFormat constants and Data append helpers for the binary header and frame layout.
The reader validates magic/version/header fields and decodes frames using MeasurementDataFormat and MeasurementDataCursor.
AudioEngine packages each processed frame as SpectrogramData for UI renderers and watch transfer.
AudioEngine sends throttled spectrogram packets and weighting selections through the iOS WatchConnectivityManager.
The iOS manager uses shared message builders, parsers, packet wrapping, and adaptive send interval constants.
The iOS manager sends and receives binary SpectrogramData payloads.
The watch/shared manager uses the same protocol contract for commands, config, and binary spectrogram packets.
Spectrogram packets wrap SpectrogramData.toBinaryData and decode with SpectrogramData.fromBinaryData.
The appStateUpdate message carries a JSON-encoded WatchAppState payload.
DashboardViewModel starts/stops iPhone or wearable live modes and feeds incoming watch spectrogram packets into AudioEngine.
DashboardViewModel observes reachability, selected source, spectrogramData, and watch recording notifications from the connectivity manager.
DashboardViewModel owns DashboardManager and forwards its changes to the dashboard view.
Dashboard layouts persist arrays of WidgetConfiguration and use its size range/default-size rules.
ModularDashboardView owns DashboardViewModel and binds its settings, layout, edit, and picker state.
The dashboard grid renders each WidgetConfiguration through WidgetCardView.
WidgetCardView routes spectrogram widgets to SpectrogramWidget.
WidgetCardView routes waterfall widgets to WaterfallWidget.
WidgetCardView routes frequency, level, octave, and phase widget types into AudioWidgets views.
WidgetCardView routes single-value widgets to SingleValueWidget.
WidgetCardView routes tone-generator widgets to ToneGeneratorWidget.
WidgetCardView routes masking widgets to MaskingEntryWidget.
SpectrogramWidget hosts HighEndSpectrogramAdapterWithAxes with widget-specific colormap/time/weighting settings.
The SwiftUI wrapper subscribes to AudioEngine.spectrogramSubject instead of @Published currentSpectrogramData for full-rate rendering.
HighEndSpectrogramAdapter creates a render pipeline using spectrogramVertex and liveSpectrogramFragment shader functions.
The adapter builds and caches 1D LUT textures through ColormapTexture.
Waterfall UI uses WaterfallDataBuilder outputs for slice/frequency datasets.
RecordingDetailView reads recording files, measurement URLs, photos, and metadata updates through RecordingManager.
RecordingDetailView uses AudioPlayerManager to play audio and feed playback samples into a visualization AudioEngine.
RecordingDetailView owns a visualization AudioEngine for playback spectrogram/widgets via processExternalAudio.
RecordingDetailView loads .spekto measurement data for analysis, exports, and playback providers.
The CSV export action creates a MeasurementDataReader and passes it to CSVExporter.
The PDF export action delegates report generation to PDFReportGenerator.
The spectrogram image export action invokes SpectrogramImageExporter on a background queue.
RecordingDetailView rebuilds waterfall datasets from playback spectrogram history with WaterfallDataBuilder.
CSVExporter streams frames from MeasurementDataReader and formats selected metrics and third-octave bands.
PDF report generation resolves recording audio, photos, and measurement sidecars through RecordingManager.
SpectrogramImageExporter delegates image computation to SpectrogramImageRenderer before writing PNG data.
RecordingManager persists, mutates, duplicates, and deletes Recording metadata entries.
The watch app entrypoint constructs WatchAudioEngine with its WatchConnectivityManager dependency.
The watch app entrypoint creates and injects the watch/shared WatchConnectivityManager.
The watch root TabView includes the modular dashboard face.
The watch root TabView includes the full-screen spectrogram face.
WatchAudioEngine observes phone-pushed spectrogram data and sends watch-originated spectrogram packets through the connectivity manager.
WatchAudioEngine creates SpectrogramData from its local FFT/DCT outputs and exposes it as liveData.
WatchAudioEngine uses WatchOperatingMode to choose companion versus wearable microphone liveData ownership.
WatchDashboardView loads WatchDashboardConfig and routes each WatchWidgetConfig to a concrete watch widget.
The watch dashboard renders configured spectrogram cells through WatchSpectrogramWidget.
The watch dashboard renders configured level-meter cells through WatchLevelMeterWidget.
The full-screen watch spectrogram consumes WatchAudioEngine.liveData and start/stop methods.
WatchSpectrogramView stores recent spectrogram frames in a fixed-capacity RingBuffer.
The compact watch spectrogram widget uses RingBuffer for O(1) frame append/drop behavior.
The level widget derives its numeric level from WatchAudioEngine.liveData.
The WidgetBundle exposes the individual level complication widgets defined in WatchComplicationWidget.
Each complication widget uses WatchComplicationProvider as its StaticConfiguration timeline provider.
Each WidgetKit family renders one of the complication views.
The provider creates WatchComplicationEntry snapshots and timelines.
On watchOS the connectivity manager writes live level and weighting into AppGroup defaults for complications.
The provider duplicates the App Group identifier and keys because Shared/AppGroup.swift is not currently compiled into the complication target.
AudioEngineTests cover initialization, controls, external audio, wearable mode, spectrogram ingestion, and history bounding.
FFTProcessorTests exercise windowing, reconfiguration, FFT outputs, dB conversion, and frequency-bin helpers.
FFTProcessorTests include diagnostic coverage for sparse and dense third-octave band detection.
FrequencyWeightingTests validate A and C weighting values at standard frequencies.
HighEndSpectrogramAdapterTests cover Metal setup, FFT updates, configuration setters, reset, and axis metrics.
MeasurementDataIOTests cover writer roundtrip, backpressure drops, and full-FFT frame support.
MeasurementDataIOTests read back generated .spekto files and validate legacy v1 decoding.
RecordingManagerTests exercise lifecycle, metadata, URL, and deletion behavior.
WatchConnectivityTests validate SpectrogramData binary serialization, invalid payload handling, and performance.
WatchConnectivityTests validate packet headers, message factories, parsers, and freshness interval constants.
WatchProtocolVersioningTests cover WatchAppState roundtrip and schema-version rejection.
WatchProtocolVersioningTests verify the SpectrogramData schema version byte and unknown-version rejection.
WidgetSizingMigrationTests cover legacy Double row decoding, per-type size clamping, and JSON roundtrip.
WidgetSizingMigrationTests verify screenshot preset layout creation across visible widget types.
WaterfallDataBuilderTests cover empty input, slice/frequency limits, source axes, and min/max preservation.
CSVExporterTests validate headers, separators, selected metric filtering, third-octave columns, and data row output.
PDFReportGeneratorTests exercise report generation paths for recordings.
SpectrogramImageExporterTests validate renderer dimensions, non-empty image output, and unreadable-file errors.
SpectrogramImageExporterTests validate PNG file output, naming, missing-audio errors, and error descriptions.
WatchAudioEngineTests cover watch audio state, gain notifications, notification guards, publishing, and deinit safety.
WatchDataProtocolTests validate watch-side SpectrogramData payload roundtrip and the Data.dropFirst slice regression.
WatchValueMappingTests cover mapping watch single-value widget types to SpectrogramData metrics.
WatchFFTTests mirror the private watch FFT algorithm to validate peak detection, output shape, and finite values.
ScreenshotCatalogTests walk dashboard default/edit/settings/picker/layout states using accessibility identifiers.
ScreenshotCatalogTests open seeded recordings and capture recording list/detail screens.
WatchAppScreenshotTests capture the watch dashboard when a watch UI test environment is available.
WatchAppScreenshotTests capture the watch spectrogram view when a watch UI test environment is available.

layers.name: iOS App
layers.description: Main SwiftUI iOS application shell, service graph, dashboard widgets, audio capture, visualization, recording, export, masking, and settings UI.

layers.name: Watch App
layers.description: watchOS app entry point, compact dashboard faces, watch-local audio engine, watch widgets, and recording session lifecycle.

layers.name: Shared Core
layers.description: Cross-target data contracts and utilities for loudness, spectrogram packets, watch value mapping, app-group persistence keys, connectivity protocol, state, logging, and buffering.

layers.name: Complications
layers.description: WidgetKit complication bundle, timeline provider, entry model, complication views, entitlements, and extension metadata.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Unit, integration, UI, screenshot, watch protocol, audio, FFT, loudness, and snapshot test coverage plus local xcresult outputs.

layers.name: Project Config
layers.description: Xcode project, shared schemes, test plans, CI preflight script, launch/test helpers, packaging exports, and build/run scripts.

layers.name: Docs
layers.description: Architecture, performance, integration, testing, watch, spectrogram, loudness, and feature reference notes.

layers.name: Design Handoff
layers.description: Visual design plates, rendering scripts, theme notes, screenshots, and HTML/JSX redesign prototypes for iOS, watch, and complications.

layers.name: Agent Planning
layers.description: Agent Context Protocol manifest, commands, milestones, tasks, reports, drafts, patterns, clarifications, and Understand Anything intermediate graph data.

tour.title: Start With the App Entrypoints
tour.description: Read the iOS and watchOS app roots to see how services are created and injected before following individual screens.

tour.title: Understand Live Audio and DSP Flow
tour.description: Trace microphone/audio state through capture, FFT, weighting, metrics, aggregation, spectrogram rendering, and shared loudness logic.

tour.title: Map the Dashboard and Widgets
tour.description: Follow the iOS dashboard shell, preset composition, widget cards, chart renderers, spectrogram, waterfall, LAF graph, single-value, and tone-generator surfaces.

tour.title: Inspect Recording, Persistence, and Export
tour.description: Review how recordings are coordinated, stored, read back, displayed, and exported as CSV, images, and PDF reports.

tour.title: Follow Watch Connectivity and Wearable UI
tour.description: Trace shared protocol messages and binary spectrogram packets into the iOS/watch managers and the watch dashboard widgets.

tour.title: Review Complications
tour.description: Read the WidgetKit bundle, provider, entry, and views to understand how watch complication data is surfaced.

tour.title: Check Masking and Bandstop Features
tour.description: Inspect the masking profile, trigger acquisition, novelty detection, preview, suggestion, and bandstop filter management feature slices.

tour.title: Use Tests as Behavior Maps
tour.description: Skim test plans and representative tests to learn expected behavior for watch protocols, audio, loudness, integration, UI, screenshots, and snapshots.

tour.title: Review Build and Project Wiring
tour.description: Use the Xcode project, schemes, Package.resolved, CI script, test plans, and export folder to understand targets and automation.

tour.title: Cross-Check Docs, Design, and Agent Plans
tour.description: Correlate implementation with architecture notes, performance contracts, redesign handoff, visual references, and ACP milestone planning.
